final:
module top_module (
        input f,
        input g,
        input h,
  wire temp1_( ~f & ~g & ~h ) |
				( ~f & ~g & h ) |
				( f & ~g & ~h ) = ( ~f & ~g & ~h ) |
				( ~f & ~g & h ) |
				( f & ~g & ~h );
  wire temp2_( f & g & h ) = ( f & g & h );
  assign m = temp1_( ~f & ~g & ~h ) |
				( ~f & ~g & h ) |
				( f & ~g & ~h ) | temp2_( f & g & h ) ;

endmodule
